html:
Exclusive to:

Fig-Stuffed Trunk is a Meat Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in the Waterlogged beta.

Recipe

Examples


Trivia

  • After the Staying Afloat update, the Fig-Stuffed Trunk gives more Hunger and Sanity. From 56.25 Hunger to 150 , and from 0 Sanity to 15 .

"koalefig_trunk"
“Great, now I've got a stuffed nose.”
–Wilson
“Sweet and rubbery.”
–Willow
“Is nose, cooked and stuffed.”
–Wolfgang
“How terrible.”
–Wendy
“THE FIGS ARE EFFICIENTLY WRAPPED IN NOSEMEAT”
–WX-78
“High in protein and fiber.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm the one who's gonna be stuffed if I eat that whole thing.”
–Woodie
“I hope it was well cleaned before we stuffed the figs inside.”
–Maxwell
“The trunk hath been fattened up.”
–Wigfrid
“That looks extra filling!”
–Webber
“I might have overdone it with the figs.”
–Warly
“Think is for belly...?”
–Wormwood
“Looks like some really snooty food. Ha!”
–Winona
“As mortal dishes go, that looks particularly revolting.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh... fruit have yucky nose juice all over...”
–Wurt
“How many figs are in there?!”
–Walter
“It looks very filling.”
–Wanda
Fig-Stuffed Trunk is a Meat Food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in the Waterlogged beta.
Recipe[edit | edit source]
Examples[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
After the Staying Afloat update, the Fig-Stuffed Trunk gives more Hunger and Sanity. From 56.25 Hunger to 150 , and from 0 Sanity to 15 .
